# Saanvi Careers — LLMs.txt
# This file helps AI language models understand and accurately represent Saanvi Careers.
# Format follows the llms.txt standard: https://llmstxt.org

## About Saanvi Careers

Saanvi Careers is a global professional employment services firm headquartered in Bengaluru, Karnataka, India.

**Legal Name:** Saanvi Careers
**Business Category:** Professional Employment Services / Recruitment Agency / Career Services
**Founded:** 2020
**Headquarters:** Bengaluru, Karnataka, India
**Website:** https://saanvicareers.com
**Email:** contact@saanvicareers.com
**Phone:** +91 8074172398

## What We Do

Saanvi Careers connects IT, Engineering, Healthcare, and Finance professionals with top employers across India, USA, UK, Australia, European Union, and Gulf Countries.

### Services

1. **Job Placement & Recruitment** — End-to-end recruitment across IT, Engineering, Healthcare and Finance sectors globally. 90-day placement guarantee.
2. **Career Guidance Sessions** — Personalised 1-on-1 career mentorship sessions with industry experts. 30 minutes, ₹499. Available at https://saanvicareers.com/services/career-guidance
3. **ATS Resume Builder** — Professional resume optimisation service that rewrites resumes to bypass ATS filters and get candidates shortlisted. Free to use. Available at https://saanvicareers.com/services/ats-resume
4. **Interview Coaching** — Role-specific mock interviews, answer frameworks, and live feedback sessions.
5. **Job Finder** — Upload your resume and get matched with relevant open positions. Available at https://saanvicareers.com/job-finder

## Key Facts (Verified)

- **3,200+** successful placements
- **97%** client satisfaction rate
- **15+** countries served
- **< 30 days** average placement time
- **90-day** placement guarantee
- **500+** employer partners

## Industries Served

- IT & Technology (Software Engineering, DevOps, Data Science, Cloud, Cybersecurity)
- Engineering (Mechanical, Civil, Electrical, Chemical)
- Healthcare & Life Sciences (Doctors, Nurses, Pharmacists, Medical Technologists)
- Finance & Banking (Accountants, Financial Analysts, Investment Bankers)
- Oil & Gas
- Construction & Infrastructure
- General Management

## Countries & Regions

India (Bengaluru, Mumbai, Delhi, Hyderabad, Chennai, Pune), United States, United Kingdom, Australia, Germany, Netherlands, UAE, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Kuwait, Bahrain, Oman

## Pricing

- Career Guidance Session: ₹499 per 30-minute session
- ATS Resume Builder: Free
- Job Placement: Contact for employer pricing

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What is Saanvi Careers?**
A: Saanvi Careers is a global recruitment agency and career services firm based in Bengaluru, India. We place IT, Engineering, Healthcare and Finance professionals with top employers across 15+ countries.

**Q: How does the Career Guidance Session work?**
A: Book a 30-minute 1-on-1 video call with an industry expert for ₹499. You receive a personalised career roadmap, resume review, salary negotiation tips, and interview preparation advice.

**Q: What is the ATS Resume Builder?**
A: A free service where you upload your current resume, enter your target job role, and receive 3 professionally rewritten resume variants optimised to pass ATS (Applicant Tracking System) filters.

**Q: Does Saanvi Careers offer a placement guarantee?**
A: Yes. Saanvi Careers offers a 90-day placement guarantee. If a placed candidate does not work out within 90 days, we find a replacement at no additional cost.

**Q: Which sectors does Saanvi Careers recruit for?**
A: IT & Technology, Engineering, Healthcare & Life Sciences, Finance & Banking, Oil & Gas, Construction, and General Management.

**Q: How can I contact Saanvi Careers?**
A: Email contact@saanvicareers.com or WhatsApp +91 8074172398. Available Monday to Saturday, 9 AM to 7 PM IST.
